title: Title the Northwind moat slide
guidance: Reward a title that states the takeaway as a claim and reads like an MBB action title. Penalise topic labels or anything unsupported by the body.

runner_input.instruction: Write the slide title as the takeaway of the body below.
runner_input.constraints: Output: a single title line only. No body, no bullets, no colon-subtitle.

items: Direct scheme connections (Visa/Mastercard) — multi-year to replicate
Fraud model trained on 5 years of proprietary transaction data

rubric_notes: Should assert switching cost / scheme connections are hard to replicate.
